message:
🐛 Fix mpv audio filter syntax: use lavfi=[] wrapper for eac3 stereo downmix (#13)

- Changed af property from ffmpeg syntax (aformat=...) to mpv syntax (lavfi=[aformat=...])
- ffplay confirmed working with aformat=channel_layouts=stereo
- mpv requires lavfi=[] wrapper for ffmpeg audio filters

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
